isi.lyrics:
Lyric krnb - You and I

Romanization

Woke up to the sun on your face
Like it was painted there on purpose
Coffee in your hand, no makeup on
And I swear the whole room started glowing


You don’t even try, you just exist
And every little thing you do is magic
If I had one wish, it’d be this
To keep you close, keep you laughing


’Cause the way you look at me
Makes my heartbeat talk
And I don’t need a reason
When you’re all I want


You and I, you and I
That’s the only thing on my mind
You and I, you and I
Baby, let the world pass by
Hold me close, don’t say goodbye
Just you and I, you and I


Streetlights turning gold on your skin
We’re walking slow like time’s got nowhere
You say my name and it pulls me in
